title: Toilet Roll Holder Stainless Steel Bathroom Loo Paper Holders Wall Mounted Heavy Duty Silver Tissue Dispenser Traditional Strong Towel Hanger Rack For Bath And Kitchen Fittings Included (1 Pack)
features: Toilet tissue dispenser is upgrade to add the buckle design which is sturdier and prevents shaking. Made of premium 304 stainless steel, ensuring quality and long lifetime. Waterproof and rustproof. Holds rolls, fit storage toilet paper roll.

The open-arm design of the Paper Holder makes it easy to change out paper rolls. There's no need to hassle with difficult spring mechanisms: simply slide the used roll off the arm, and slide on a new roll. NO wobbling nor dropping off! Just enjoy this sturdy and heavy duty design.

The tissue holder comes with all necessary installation hardware plus a stamped steel mounting bracket and template to make setup easy. The arm can be rotated to allow the opening to be fitted to suit your needs

Modern square design, stylish and beautiful, is the best choice for your bathroom decoration. The product's edge chamfering and polishing design can protect your family from harm, and the elderly and children can use it with confidence.

Toilet Roll Holder is manufactured to standards that ensure the highest strength and durability in wet environments - it is ideal for use in bathrooms, toilets, etc. Because of the strength of the material and its antibacterial qualities, it is also suitable for intensive use in hotels, education and medical institutions. It can be fitted for left and right use
description: Product Description Kitchen Bathroom Loo Paper Holders Wall Mounted It would add simplicity to your bathroom no matter what kind of decor style you have. Our toilet paper holder fits exactly in. By installing our toilet roll holder black, it would save you more space. Improve the efficiency of your bathroom and kitchen. Exquisite packaging, which is a good gift for your family. The black toilet paper holder has a smooth structure and no sharp edges to protect you and your child's skin from cuts. Anti-drop design at the end to prevent the roll from falling off. Suitable surfaces Flagstone Marble Metal Rough Natural Stone Cement, Wood and some synthetic surfaces* Bathroom Bedroom
